name: Select
description: A feature-rich select dropdown with search, keyboard navigation, custom options, grouped options, and creatable functionality.
usage_guidelines: Use for selecting single option from a list.
Enable isSearchable for large option lists.
Use isCreatable to allow users to create new options.
Group related options using GroupOption structure.
Customize option rendering with customOption prop.
Handle onChange to update form state.

defaultValue.description: Default selected option for uncontrolled component.

customInputDisplay.description: Custom render function for selected value display.

noOptionsMessage.description: Message shown when no options match.

styling_info.visual_description: A dropdown input showing selected value with chevron icon. Opens floating menu with options list. Supports search input, keyboard navigation, and custom option rendering.

Dont: Don't use for very few options (use Radio instead)
Don't make options list too long without search

AsyncOnSearch.title: Async On Search

Basic.title: Basic
Basic.code:
import Select from '@/components/ui/Select'

const colourOptions = [
    { value: 'ocean', label: 'Ocean', color: '#00B8D9' },
    { value: 'blue', label: 'Blue', color: '#0052CC' },
    { value: 'purple', label: 'Purple', color: '#5243AA' },
    { value: 'red', label: 'Red', color: '#FF5630' },
    { value: 'orange', label: 'Orange', color: '#FF8B00' },
    { value: 'yellow', label: 'Yellow', color: '#FFC400' },
    { value: 'green', label: 'Green', color: '#36B37E' },
    { value: 'forest', label: 'Forest', color: '#00875A' },
    { value: 'slate', label: 'Slate', color: '#253858' },
    { value: 'silver', label: 'Silver', color: '#666666' },
]

const Basic = () => {
    return <Select placeholder="Please Select" options={colourOptions} />
}

export default Basic
